description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:stretch Docker image and a global before_script that runs apt-get update -yqq. Define a single job named test:7.0 in the default test stage that uses the same debian:stretch image and executes apt-get install -yqq php php-zip php-xml composer, then composer install, then composer test. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
